name: Seed 63 files, then run the cursor-loop campaign: each iteration crawls one bounded chunk (batch_size 10 × max_batches 2 = 20 files) resuming from the previous cursor, publishing every batch durably to the INVENTORY_FOLD stream (sink mode — no engine channel tokens); mekhan's fold consumer upserts file_inventory idempotently. 63 files / 20 per chunk → 4 iterations (20+20+20+3), exiting when `exhausted` goes true. `iterations` is the loop's parked counter, which finishes at 3 (0-based enter + three continues).
